economic_notes: Band has investments in 9086 Investments Ltd., Swl'eps Limited Partnership, Swl'eps Operating Corporation, and Nmimhl Tmixw Holding Corporation. COVID-19 noted as significant event with uncertain future impact. Band participates in BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2020 (not 2024). Four business entities accounted for under modified equity method (9086 Investments Ltd., Swl'eps Limited Partnership, Swl'eps Operating Corporation, Nmimhl Tmixw Holding Corporation). No schedule of remuneration provided. COVID-19 disclosed as significant event. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($1,277,157) + Province of BC ($104,416) + CMHC ($15,123) + First Nation Health Authority ($84000) + Ottawa trust fund income ($799) + Thompson-Nicola Regional District ($19,818) = $1,501,313 less confirmation from segmented report other government = $204,338 plus ISC $1,277,157 = $1,481,495; used ISC + FNHA + BC + CMHC + TNRD + Ottawa trust = $1,501,313 but segment shows other government as $204,338 so total government = $1,277,157 + $204,338 = $1,481,495. Funds held in Ottawa Trust Fund ($492,102) included as financial asset on balance sheet. Segmented information does not include a separate health segment. Capital segment expense of $670 is actual vs budget $1,360,712.
